heading_prefix: A course in the classics should feel like an
body_1: Nick Rosado teaches literature with a focus on moral seriousness, dramatic structure, and the spiritual power of great art.
body_2: These courses are built for students who want more than summaries: close reading, context, argument, and sustained attention to the highest works of the Western canon.
pull_quote: The goal is not merely to understand the classics, but to learn how to experience their greatness.
